summary: P25 Wastage Report UI - All backend tests pass (7/7). Frontend testing completed with all major features verified. KPI cards, filters, table columns, badges, and WastageEntryForm with API-driven reasons all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: WastageReport.jsx correctly implements all P25 requirements with proper data-testid attributes
KPI cards show: Total Records, Net Wastage, Batch Audited, Physical Count
Filters work correctly: waste type dropdown (All Types/Loss/Gain), batch audited toggle
Table has all required columns: Date, Item, Type, Quantity, Unit, Reason, Batch, Expiry, Source
WasteTypeBadge shows Loss (red) and Gain (green) correctly
SourceTypeBadge shows 'legacy' for records without source_type (correct behavior)
Summary footer shows Loss, Gain, Stores count
No recorded_by column in table (as required)
WastageEntryForm uses API-driven reasons via useWastageReasons hook
Wastage reason dropdown shows API reasons: Others, Expired, Pilferage, Spillage, Other
seed_data_creation: None - using real POS API via proxy
context_for_next_testing_agent: P25 Wastage Report fully tested. All features working: KPI cards (total records, net wastage, batch audited, physical count), filters (waste type dropdown, batch toggle), table with P25 columns, WasteTypeBadge (Loss red, Gain green), SourceTypeBadge (legacy for null source_type), summary footer, WastageEntryForm with API-driven reasons. Test data: 6 wastage records in May 2026, all Loss type, all legacy source_type, 0 batch-audited.

features_tested.BACKEND-4: PASS - Wastage report has_batch=true filter returns 0 records (correct)

features_tested.BACKEND-6: PASS - Wastage report waste_type=Gain filter returns 0 records (correct)
features_tested.BACKEND-7: PASS - Wastage report summary has total_records, total_loss, total_gain, net_wastage, applied_restaurant_ids

features_tested.FRONTEND-5: PASS - Table has all 9 columns: Date, Item, Type, Quantity, Unit, Reason, Batch, Expiry, Source

features_tested.FRONTEND-9: PASS - Waste type dropdown shows All Types, Loss, Gain options

features_tested.FRONTEND-14: PASS - Reason options: Others, Expired, Pilferage, Spillage, Other
